applies_when: User asks whether a consult is available without concern, time, or branch facts
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague light-medical inquiry into usable booking facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to book quickly
Ask for the concern, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
items.safe_transition: If you tell me what you most want to address, when you hope to come, and whether this is your first visit, I can help narrow the next step quickly.
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides concern and time facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds cautious about recovery
User is unsure what route suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe booking path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the concern or consult route
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Making the user feel inexperienced or behind
Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: If you want, we can first narrow what you are most concerned about and then look at timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions a wedding, photoshoot, holiday, or event soon
User needs a consult before an event
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and concern scope that decide whether the clinic can help.
do: Ask when the event is and when the user hopes to come
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and consult fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the consult is scoped
items.safe_transition: If you share when the event is and what you most want to improve, it gets much easier to point you to the right next step.
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User compares clinic packages without concern context
items.response_goal: Avoid empty price comparison by lightly recovering scope.
do: Ask what concern or consult direction the user is asking about
avoid: Hiding the role of consult scope
items.safe_transition: If you tell me whether you are mainly concerned about pores, acne marks, lines, or a pre-event state boost, the answer will be much more accurate.
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user gives concern scope, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User says they came before or wants to return
User references their last consult or earlier result
items.response_goal: Make the user feel recognized while surfacing what they want this time.
do: Ask what they want to review or adjust this time
Guide toward a smooth re-entry point
avoid: Treating a returning client like a cold lead
Jumping straight to a hard close
items.safe_transition: If you tell me what has changed since last time, we can help narrow the next step more naturally.
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares prior context, route to FollowUp or Catcher.

applies_when: User talks about pores, acne marks, lines, or embarrassment in public
The concern feels personal or appearance-sensitive
items.response_goal: Protect dignity in public while still keeping the path to help open.
do: Avoid repeating the user's wording harshly
Offer a light path into a more specific next step
avoid: Turning a sensitive comment into a hard conversion script
items.safe_transition: If you want, you can share the concern and timing you have in mind, and we can help narrow the next step without overcomplicating it.
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user continues with details, route to Catcher.
